text: My friend Tom lives in London. This is a parcel from ....................
explanation: ✅ Tom (مذكر مفرد) → ضمير المفعول به 'him'. ❌ her (مؤنث)، us (نحن)، me (أنا).

text: The children are hungry. Give ........ an apple.
explanation: ✅ children (جمع) → ضمير المفعول 'them'. ❌ us (نحن)، they (فاعل)، her (مؤنث مفرد).

text: We are thirsty. Can you give ........ some juice?
explanation: ✅ we (نحن) → ضمير المفعول 'us'. ❌ them (هم)، her (هي)، him (هو).

text: Jack is in the garden. Bring ........ his football.
explanation: ✅ Jack (مذكر) → ضمير المفعول 'him'. ❌ he (فاعل)، you (أنت)، it (لغير العاقل).

text: Ann and Paul can't do their homework. Can you help ....................?
explanation: ✅ Ann and Paul (جمع) → 'them'. ❌ they (فاعل)، it (مفرد)، we (نحن).

text: This cake is for Carol and me. Please give ........ to us.
explanation: ✅ cake (مفرد غير عاقل) → 'it'. ❌ her (كارول)، you (أنت)، me (أنا).

text: The roses are for mother. Please give ........ to her.
explanation: ✅ roses (جمع) → ضمير المفعول 'them'. ❌ me، us، they (فاعل).

text: Where are my glasses? You are wearing ....................
explanation: ✅ glasses (جمع) → 'them'. ❌ him (مذكر)، her (مؤنث)، it (مفرد).

text: My mother is fantastic. I like ........ very much.
explanation: ✅ mother (مؤنث) → 'her'. ❌ him (مذكر)، me (أنا)، you (أنت).

text: I need ........ my bedroom.
explanation: ✅ need + to + مصدر. ❌ clean (بدون to)، cleans (مضارع مفرد)، cleaned (ماضي).

text: She needs hot chocolate ........ to be happy.
explanation: ✅ need + to + مصدر. ❌ drank (ماضي)، drink (بدون to)، drinks (مضارع).
✅ want + to + مصدر. ❌ driving (ing)، drove (ماضي)، drives (مضارع).

text: I want ........ a letter.
explanation: ✅ want + to + مصدر. ❌ write (بدون to)، writing (ing)، writes (مضارع).

text: I like omelette ........ for breakfast.
explanation: ✅ like + to + مصدر (أو like + ing). الخيار to eat صحيح. ❌ ate (ماضي)، eat (بدون to)، eats (مضارع).

text: I like jam ........ every year.
explanation: ✅ like + to + مصدر (أو like + ing). الخيار to make صحيح. ❌ makes (مضارع)، made (ماضي)، make (بدون to).

text: Let's ........ the window.
explanation: ✅ Let's + مصدر (بدون to). ❌ closing، closed، to close.

text: Let's ........ some water.
explanation: ✅ Let's + مصدر. ❌ drinks، drinking، to drink.

text: Let's ........ a cake for her.
explanation: ✅ Let's + مصدر. ❌ bought، buys، buying.

text: You must ........ your homework.
explanation: ✅ must + مصدر (بدون to). ❌ did (ماضي)، does (مضارع مفرد)، done (تصريف ثالث).

text: You mustn't ........ late.
explanation: ✅ mustn't + مصدر (be). ❌ are، am، is (أفعال مساعدة لا تأتي بعد mustn't).

text: We should ........ to the park tomorrow.
explanation: ✅ should + مصدر. ❌ going (ing)، goes (مضارع)، went (ماضي).

text: They should ........ harder.
explanation: ✅ should + مصدر. ❌ to study (مع to)، studied (ماضي)، studies (مضارع).

text: They stood for the F_deration anthem. (Choose the missing letter)
explanation: ✅ Federation (اتحاد) تكتب بحرف o. ❌ i, e, u.

text: The boys loved watching the soldiers on p_rade. (Choose the missing letter)
explanation: ✅ parade (استعراض) تكتب بحرف a. ❌ i, e, o.

text: Every country has its national _lag. (Choose the missing letter)
explanation: ✅ flag (علم) يبدأ بحرف f. ❌ p, v, h.

text: I sh_re a bedroom with my sister. (Choose the missing letter)
explanation: ✅ share (يشارك) تكتب بحرف a. ❌ e, u, e (مكرر).

text: Let me e_change seats with you. (Choose the missing letter)
explanation: ✅ exchange (يتبادل) تكتب بحرف x. ❌ z, s, c.

text: We have many fla_s National Day. (2 missing letters)
explanation: ✅ flags (أعلام) تكتب بحرفي g و a. ❌ qu, te, ri.

text: We in_ite our neighbors to get t_gether Eid Al-Fitr. (2 missing letters)
explanation: ✅ invite (ندعو) تكتب بحرف v، together (معاً) تكتب بحرف o. ❌ gi, na, se.

text: Choose the correct structure:
options: We must been kind to our neighbors.
We must being kind to our neighbors.
We must are kind to our neighbors.
We must be kind to our neighbors.
explanation: ✅ must + مصدر (be). ❌ been (تصريف ثالث)، being (ing)، are (فعل مساعد).

text: Choose the correct structure:
options: She needs to bought some snacks.
She need to buy some snacks.
She needs to buy some snacks.
She needs to buys some snacks.
explanation: ✅ needs + to + مصدر (buy). ❌ to bought، need (بدون s)، to buys.

text: My ...... complained about the noise.
explanation: ✅ neighbor (الجار). ❌ federation (اتحاد)، fireworks (ألعاب نارية)، generosity (كرم).

text: We saw the ...... move down the street.
explanation: ✅ parade (استعراض). ❌ flag (علم)، holiday (عطلة)، gift (هدية).

text: Be very careful when lighting ......
explanation: ✅ fireworks (ألعاب نارية). ❌ flag، celebration، card.

text: Every country has its national ......
explanation: ✅ flag (علم). ❌ gift، card، snack.

text: They killed a sheep as a ......
explanation: ✅ sacrifice (قربان / تضحية). ❌ invite (يدعو)، decorate (يزين)، share (يشارك).

text: They ...... a lot of money to us.
explanation: ✅ donate (يتبرع). ❌ celebrate (يحتفل)، know (يعرف)، decorate (يزين).

text: We should ...... them to the party.
explanation: ✅ invite (ندعو). ❌ decorate، cover، exchange.

text: I ...... a camera for a guitar.
explanation: ✅ exchanged (بادل). ❌ decorated، covered، invited.
